  • Uses of Visitable in io.apicurio.datamodels.models.visitors

    Methods in io.apicurio.datamodels.models.visitors with parameters of type Visitable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    AbstractTraverser.doTraverseNode(Visitable node)
    Traverse the given node.
    protected void
    AbstractTraverser.traverseNode(String propertyName, Visitable node)
    Traverse into the given node, unless it's null.

    Description
